name: HWR_VLTR_ORGANIZATION_VL
query: SELECT A.ORGANIZATION_ID ORGANIZATION_ID, A.ORGANIZATION_TYPE ORGANIZATION_TYPE, B.NAME NAME, B.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, A.STATE STATE, A.LOCATION_ID, A.ORGANIZATION_ADDRESS_ID, A.CONTACT_EMAIL CONTACT_EMAIL, A.CONTACT_PHONE CONTACT_PHONE, A.CONTACT_FAX CONTACT_FAX, A.WEBSITE WEBSITE, A.AREAS_OF_INTEREST AREAS_OF_INTEREST, A.PARENT_AFFILIATIONS PARENT_AFFILIATIONS, A.LOGO_FILE_ID, B.CONTACT_FIRST_NAME CONTACT_FIRST_NAME, B.CONTACT_LAST_NAME CONTACT_LAST_NAME, B.CONTACT_TITLE CONTACT_TITLE, B.MISSION_STATEMENT MISSION_STATEMENT, A.EIN, A.EINSTATUS EINSTATUS, A.CREATOR_PERSON_ID CREATOR_PERSON_ID, A.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, A.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, A.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, A.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, A.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, A.SUBMITTED_BY SUBMITTED_BY, A.LONGITUDE LONGITUDE, A.LATITUDE LATITUDE FROM HWR_VLTR_ORGANIZATION_B A, HWR_VLTR_ORGANIZATION_TL B WHERE A.ORGANIZATION_ID = B.ORGANIZATION_ID AND B.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
